message:
Add HTTPS workaround for marketplace installation

Some users encounter SSH authentication issues when adding the marketplace
with the shorthand syntax. Added a tip with the full HTTPS URL as fallback.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -13,6 +13,13 @@ First, add this repository as a plugin marketplace:
 /plugin marketplace add tenzir/claude-plugins
 ```
 
+> [!TIP]
+> If you encounter SSH authentication issues, use the full HTTPS URL instead:
+>
+> ```
+> /plugin marketplace add https://github.com/tenzir/claude-plugins.git
+> ```
+
 Then browse and install available plugins:
 
 ```
